Okay, so once we have our billing all situated and we've got our plan picked and what have you, it's going to bring us to this screen here. Now we want to import the campaigns. I'm making the video now, but the campaigns are here. Soon the video will be right above these. There are four campaigns. The webhook setup is to help us set up our webhooks just like it says. Then we have a campaign for the opt-in. Consult is where they schedule the appointment and cancel this where they cancel the appointment or you cancel the appointment. This is not a no show. This is just that they cancelled their appointment and it'll put them into a campaign so that we can ask them to reschedule. So to get the campaigns we're going to click on the button. It's going to bring this up and so we're going to bring up our domain and then log in. And then it's going to bring it up. This is our setup webhook campaign. So we're just going to go over here and put in webhook setup. I usually make a category just because I like to keep everything filed away. In this case I did test and you can actually create it here. So if you have more than one location and you want them to be different campaigns for each location you will have to update these tags everywhere. So we just took this one. I'm going to do save. Let's go back into the campaigns here and I'll show you what I mean. When you go into this opt-in campaign for six week submission it's going to check for tags. So if you change the tags at all where you don't have them exact then they'll start getting messages even though they've scheduled. So this one checks to see if they've scheduled a consult or an appointment. This one checks to see if they canceled and then this one checks to see if they no showed. So and those are all the way throughout the campaigns. So something to keep in mind when you are setting up your tags if you're going to be doing it for different locations or you want them to be different there's a lot of editing involved. So yeah anyway then you can grab the next one. Free six week consult. This one here is just going to let agile know that they've scheduled an appointment so we don't nag them anymore to schedule an appointment. So and all it does is delete the tags for canceled, new or no show. It just lets everything know that they have scheduled an appointment.
